title: Delicate Briny Syrian Narutomaki Noodles
description: A tender and flavorful Syrian dish featuring narutomaki, perfect for a weeknight dinner, this recipe is egg-free-friendly and uses sous-vide cooking for precise temperature control.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the narutomaki and cook for 2 minutes until lightly browned.
Add the lemon juice, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook the Syrian noodles according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, narutomaki mixture, and water.
Stir to combine and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the mixture to a sous-vide bag and seal.
Cook in a sous-vide water bath at 180 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
